ogTitle: Tods Corner vs Toiberry: Climate Safety

heading: Tods Corner vs Toiberry — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tods Corner, Tasmania and Toiberry, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Toiberry has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Tods Corner (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tods Corner or Toiberry safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tods Corner has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Toiberry scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tods Corner scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Toiberry scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tods Corner or Toiberry?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Toiberry has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
